entity.label: Hazar-gaddah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Village of fortune, a city on the south border of Judah (Josh. 15:27), midway between the Mediterranean and the Dead Sea.

verses.text: And Hazargaddah, and Heshmon, and Bethpalet,
